heroHeadline: Iran War Decimated a Generation of Senior Leadership, NYT Analysis Finds — Structural Shift in Post-War Iran
heroSubtitle: A New York Times analysis finds the 40-day US-Israel campaign killed or displaced a generation of experienced Iranian commanders and officials, accelerating the rise of younger, less seasoned figures — one of the conflict's most lasting strategic consequences.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-08. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times.
